attributes.name: [SQL Server OTel] Page life expectancy low

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// Instance-level metric: buffer pool page lifetime in seconds
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy IS NOT NULL
| STATS min_ple = MIN(metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
// PLE below 300s indicates severe memory pressure; adjust threshold for your environment
| WHERE min_ple < 300
| KEEP instance_id, min_ple
